prompt: A professional product photography shot of a {argument name="product" default="cold sparkling water can"} placed upright in {argument name="setting" default="golden beach sand"}. The can is {argument name="branding colors" default="silver and teal"}, covered in realistic water droplets condensation, with a pineapple illustration and tropical branding. The can is slightly tilted, planted in a small mound of fine golden sand with tiny white pebbles and small green tropical leaves/grass scattered around the base. Background features a bold split composition - bright sky-blue on the left and vivid yellow on the right, with a large blurred real pineapple placed behind the can on the right side. A blurred tropical palm leaf drapes in from the upper left corner, adding depth and framing. Macro-level water condensation droplets visible on the can surface. Lighting is bright, vibrant, commercial studio lighting with clean shadows. Shallow depth of field - can in sharp focus, background softly blurred. Mood: summer, tropical, fresh, refreshing. Commercial product photography, ultra-detailed, 8K.
translatedPrompt: 一张专业的商业产品摄影照片，主体为 {argument name="product" default="冰镇气泡水罐"}，垂直放置在 {argument name="setting" default="金色沙滩"} 上。罐身为 {argument name="branding colors" default="银色与青色"}，表面覆盖着逼真的冷凝水珠，印有菠萝插画和热带风格的品牌标识。罐身略微倾斜，插在细软的金色沙堆中，底座周围散落着细小的白色鹅卵石和绿色热带叶片/草丛。背景采用大胆的分割构图——左侧为明亮的天蓝色，右侧为鲜艳的黄色，右后方放置着一个模糊处理的真实菠萝。左上角垂下一片模糊的热带棕榈叶，增加了画面的深度与框架感。罐体表面可见微距级别的冷凝水珠。光线采用明亮、鲜艳的商业摄影棚布光，阴影干净利落。浅景深效果——罐身焦点清晰，背景柔和虚化。氛围：夏季、热带、清新、提神。商业产品摄影，超高细节，8K 分辨率。

breakdown.creativeCore: 热带风情产品摄影：一个用于商业产品摄影的专业摄影棚提示词，旨在拍摄热带海滩背景下饮料罐的特写，呈现鲜艳色彩与微距细节。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
